steps.t: Gunderic Grubb is at The Golden Perch in Stock, south and east of Brockenborings. Sigismond North-took told you to take the clover you collected to Gu…
The statue of the Bullroarer is at the north edge of Brockenborings, north and west of Stock, overlooking the Greenfields. You have been instructed to…
Sigismond North-took is in Brockenborings. You have paid your respects to Bandobras Took. Now you should return to Sigismond North-took.
Speak with Tobias Brockhouse just east of Brockenborings.
